name: sales-tax-api

scripts.package: pnpm type-check && pnpm lint && pnpm openapi:lint && pnpm check-formatting && pnpm test && pnpm build && cd target && zip -qr sales-tax-api.zip ./*.js.map ./*.js
scripts.packageQuick: pnpm build && cd target && zip -qr sales-tax-api.zip ./*.js.map ./*.js
scripts.openapi:preview: redocly build-docs openapi.yaml --output target/docs/index.html && open target/docs/index.html

NOTICE1: MANAGED FILE: to push changes see buildcheck/README.md - template: buildcheck/data/templates/handler/package.json.ts
NOTICE2: all dependencies are defined in buildcheck/data/build.ts
